item.action: Persist trusted-root state with atomic compare-and-swap semantics and crash recovery.

progress.finding: A root that passes signature policy still requires a separate persistence commit point. Compare-and-swap against the exact current digest prevents two valid competing N+1 candidates from both becoming trusted on one local store.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime
progress.trust_limit: This prototype establishes single-host local-filesystem exclusion and digest integrity only. It does not establish distributed consensus, stale-lock recovery, network-filesystem safety, or correct authorization of nextRoot.

item.handoff: R-019 should add process-level fault injection and stale-lock lease recovery, proving behavior across termination points and documenting filesystem-specific guarantees.
